title: Instructions should be upper case
description: While Dockerfile instructions are not case-sensitive, adhering to uppercase conventions for instructions helps enhance clarity and collaboration within development teams. This ensures that instructions are more easily distinguishable from arguments and contributes to effective collaboration. What is the potential impact? In the world of programming, even small details can have significant repercussions.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Dockerfile instructions should be uppercase for better readability and consistency. Found lowercase instruction. Convert it to uppercase (e.g., 'from' -> 'FROM', 'run' -> 'RUN').
